title: Log in and reach the dashboard overview
description: Verifies an existing creator can log in with valid credentials and land on the dashboard overview.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard overview

title: Protect the dashboard from anonymous deep-link access and redirect back after login
description: Verifies an anonymous user deep-linking to the dashboard is redirected to login and after successful login is redirected back to the dashboard overview.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard/overview
Verify the user is redirected to the login page
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard overview

title: Create a new creator account
description: Verifies a new user can register with a valid email and password and sees a confirmation that the account was created.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill in the email field with creator+new1@example.com
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Submit the registration form
Verify a confirmation of account creation is visible

title: View dashboard overview statistics and open the story editor
description: Verifies an authenticated creator can view overview statistics and navigate from the dashboard into the story editor flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard overview to finish loading
Verify overview statistics are displayed
Click the dashboard control that opens the story editor
Verify the story editor is displayed

title: Edit story metadata, save, and see updates reflected on the overview
description: Verifies a creator can open a story from the dashboard, update metadata, save, and return to the overview where the updated metadata is reflected.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the dashboard control that opens the story editor
Fill a new value into the story title field
Save the story changes
Navigate back to the dashboard overview using in-app navigation
Verify the updated story metadata is shown on the overview

title: Read a featured published story from the landing page
description: Verifies an anonymous visitor can open a featured story from the landing page and read the story content in the reader view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the featured stories section
Click a featured story to open it
Verify the story reader view is displayed
Verify story content is displayed

title: Return to landing page from the story reader
description: Verifies an anonymous visitor can navigate back to the landing page after opening a story in the reader.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the featured stories section
Click a featured story to open it
Click the navigation control to return to the landing page
Verify the landing page is displayed
Verify featured stories are displayed

title: Landing page shows featured stories list
description: Verifies the landing page renders a list of featured stories for anonymous visitors.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll through the landing page content
Verify featured stories are displayed

title: Reader supports moving through story content
description: Verifies an anonymous visitor can progress through a story in the reader using standard reader navigation controls.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the featured stories section
Click a featured story to open it
Click the reader control to go to the next part of the story
Verify the reader remains open and displays story content

title: Open a published story from site search
description: Verifies an anonymous visitor can use site search (when available) to open a published story and reach the reader.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click into the site search input if it is present
Fill "folk" into the site search field
Press Enter
Click a story result to open it
Verify the story reader view is displayed
Verify story content is displayed

title: Reject login with non-existent account credentials
description: Verifies login shows an invalid credentials message when a non-existent account attempts to sign in.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with creator+doesnotexist@example.com
Fill in the password field with any-password
Submit the login form
Verify an invalid credentials message is visible

title: Block registration with invalid email format
description: Verifies registration shows an inline email validation error when the email format is invalid.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill in the email field with invalid-email
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Submit the registration form
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Show email validation error on login for invalid email format
description: Verifies the login form shows an email validation error when an invalid email is submitted.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with not-an-email
Fill in the password field with any-password
Submit the login form
Verify an email validation error is visible
